SEARCH

Deprecated API

Contents

  • Methods
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    io.github.simplejdbcmapper.core.SimpleJdbcMapperUtils.chunkTheList(List, Integer)
    Use chunkList() instead. Splits the list into multiple lists by chunk size. Can be used to split the sql IN clauses since some databases have a limitation on 'IN' clause entries and size
    io.github.simplejdbcmapper.core.SimpleJdbcMapperUtils.mergeResultsToPopulateHasMany(List<T>, List<U>, String, String, String)
    Use populateHasMany() instead. Merges the corresponding list of child objects to the 'hasMany' property of the parent 
     Example use case could be: 
 1) Query to get a list of employees
 2) Use an IN/ANY clause query to get all the skills for those employees 
 3) Use mergeResultsToPopulateHasMany() to merge the 2 result sets to populate the employee.skills property
    io.github.simplejdbcmapper.core.SimpleJdbcMapperUtils.mergeResultsToPopulateHasOne(List<T>, List<U>, String, String, String)
    Use populateHasOne() instead. Merges the corresponding child object to the 'hasOne' property of the parent. 
     Example use case: 
 1) Query for a list of users
 2) Use an IN/ANY clause query to get the profiles for the users 
 3) Use method mergeResultsToPopulateHasOne() to merge the 2 result sets to populate the user.profile property
